info.name: EAFC 26 Player Analytics API
info.description: Generated Postman Collection covering all 88 endpoints. Organized logically by folders representing controllers and routing middleware blocks.

query.description: Field to sort by (e.g. ovr, pace, shooting, age, rank, name). Append -desc or -asc.
Search query for keyword match against name, team, league, nation
Filter players by club team name
Filter players by playing position (e.g. ST, RW, LW, CM, CB, GK)

request.description: Fetch all football player records from dataset with support for pagination, sorting, search, and attribute filtering.
Fetch single player details using the unique player ID.
Add a new football player record to the dataset.
Replace complete player record fields using player ID.
Update specific player fields rather than replacing the whole document.
Delete player record from dataset by unique player ID.
Check whether player exists in database or not without fetching entire model content.
Insert multiple player records together in one database transaction.
Update multiple player records together using bulk transactions.
Delete multiple player records simultaneously by list of IDs.
Fetch player details using a name route parameter.
Fetch player using global rating rank.
Fetch players belonging to a specific club team.
Fetch players belonging to a specific league.
Fetch players by nationality.
Fetch players using their primary playing position.
Fetch players using age parameter.
Fetch players using gender category.
Fetch players filtered by a specific play style attribute.
Fetch players based on their preferred kicking foot.
Fetch highest rated players in descending overall score sequence.
Fetch fastest players with highest pace attributes.
Fetch best dribbling players.
Fetch best finishing / shooting score players.
Fetch best passing score players.
Fetch best defensive attributes players.
Fetch strongest physical rating players.
Fetch highest rated young players (under 21).
Fetch recently added player records in the database.

query.description: The search keyword (e.g. salah, mbappe, real madrid)

request.description: Search players using keyword matching against names, clubs, leagues, nations, and playstyles.
Fetch highest rated player records structured for analytical visualization charts.
Fetch youngest players data for statistical age plots.
Analyze oldest active player records.
Analyze top shooting/finishing performance scores.
Analyze players with the best passing/vision stats.
Analyze best dribbling execution performance metrics.
Analyze defensive structure metrics.
Analyze strength, stamina, and physical scores.
Analyze play style distributions across high overall players.
Analyze teams with highest average ratings.
Analyze leagues with highest average ratings.
Analyze nations with highest average ratings.
Calculate total player records registered in database.
Calculate average rating values for database records.
Identify and fetch player with highest overall rating.
Identify and fetch player with highest pace rating.
Get total counts of players grouped by club team.
Get counts of players grouped by league.
Get counts of players grouped by nation.
Register a new user account inside the database.
Log in an existing user and return a JWT access token.
Clear session session tokens and log out user.
Fetch profile metadata of the currently authenticated user.
Update fields in the active user's account profile.
Delete the active authenticated user profile account permanently.
Trigger password recovery request by email.
Reset password using the reset token received via email.
Change active account password with current credentials.
Verify user email using verification token.
Generate and send a temporary One-Time Password for authentication.
Verify OTP code sequence for MFA setup.
Access profile information using JWT verification.
Access user dashboard statistics using JWT verification.
Explicit route to generate a fresh JWT token for testing.
Validate structure and expiration details of a JWT token.
Renew access tokens using valid refresh tokens.
Add a token to the blacklist/revoke session tokens.
Retrieve dashboard configs restricted to administrator permissions.
Practice endpoint triggers system console request logger.
Practice authorization middleware routing helper.
Verify rate limiter throttling configurations.
Trigger a test mock error to verify global exception formats.
Test execution speed tracking headers (`X-Response-Time`).
Practice checking permissions bounds of active user profiles.
Practice payload verification schemas validator triggers.

query.description: Input parameter query containing potential XSS script code

request.description: Practice sanitization script escaping and database query sanitizing routines.
Fetch random football player record from the dataset.
Fetch trending football player profiles based on recent database views or searches.

query.description: The player ID to base recommendations on

request.description: Recommend similar players using rating profiles and position matching.
Predict future stats and overall growth trends based on age and potential.

query.description: Player ID to retrieve estimated value

request.description: Estimate market value based on stats, age, and reputation.
Generate best possible dream team based on overall ratings.
Build custom football squad configurations using selected players.
Calculate chemistry connections (clubs, leagues, nations) for a custom squad.
Generate stats distribution coordinate arrays for plotting radial comparison spider graphs.
Ultra-fast typeahead endpoints returning simple name lists for autocomplete controls.
